This folder is an unmodified copy of Jos Stam's CDROM_GDC03 starting-point archive.

Why it is included:
- The assignment explicitly names CDROM_GDC03.zip as the starting implementation reference.
- The original archive contains the C source files in code/demo.c and code/solver.c.
- It also contains old PocketPC2002 demo executables and a Palm binary. These are historical/reference binaries only.

Important:
- The Project 2 CLion/CMake build does NOT compile or run these old binaries.
- Do not submit these as your own code; they are included only to preserve the exact reference material that came with the assignment.
- The implemented Project 2 code is in include/common and src.
